query: What is covered for dental implants?
answer:
Dental implant surgery is covered if a participating provider determines it's dentally appropriate and prepares a treatment plan beforehand.

| Benefit | Service | In-Network | Out-of-Network | Limitations |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Implants | D6010 Surgical placement of implant body: endosteal | Covered In Full, up to the $1,500 | Not covered | Data Not Found |
| Implants | D6010 Surgical placement of implant body: endosteal implant | Data Not Found | Not covered | Data Not Found |
| Implants | D6011 Second state implant surgery | Covered In Full, up to the $1,500 | Not covered | Data Not Found |

| Topic | Coverage Information |
| :--- | :--- |
| Dental Implant Surgery | The dental implant services described in this section are covered for Enrollees if all of the following requirements are met: 1) A Participating Provider determines that dental implants are dentally appropriate for you. 2) A Participating Provider prepares the treatment plan for dental implants prior to initiating any implant treatment. 3) All dental implant services are provided by a Participating Provider or under a referral from a Participating Provider. • Benefits for dental implant surgery are limited to a yearly benefit maximum of $1,500 per member. • Dental implant surgery limited to one implant per calendar year The following dental implant procedures are Covered Services under this benefit: D6010 Surgical placement of implant body: endosteal implant D6011 Second state implant surgery All other services are not covered including: • Dental implant supported prosthetics or abutment-supported prosthetics (crown, bridges and dentures) 12 Willamette Dental Plan January 1, 2024... |
